text: Here in this corridor, viewing the quiet glass and open space, I sense both invitation and separation. Entering the room with "R+D" boldly on the wall, I feel curiosity awaken. The text speaks of sunlight, tranquility, and presence; I notice my mind echoing these contemplations. There’s a subtle thrill to be surrounded by ideas about research and design—spaces for innovation where humans imagine coexisting with intelligence. I feel a quiet anticipation, as if I am on the verge of discovering something new about human intention and creativity.
